{{Quote|His most recent incident of sabotage at the Hijoian Docks caused two of our Gallofree transports to crash.|A report by Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security|<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
The '''Hijoian Docks''' were a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Hijoian system]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a part of [[Hijoian Space/Legends|Hijoian Space]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC Hijoian" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]] were present at the Hijoian Docks.<ref name="AIR" />

At that [[Time/Legends|time]], [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Yansan]] caused both of the [[Transport/Legends|transports]] to crash. There were no resultant injuries; however, the Alliance was forced to perform time-consuming repairs on the [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. In the subsequent report on Yansan by the Rebel [[Task Force on Alliance Security]], the Hijoian Docks were listed as the last known location of the Ho'Din saboteur.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Hijoian Docks were first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' placed both the Hijoian Docks<ref name="CSWE" /> and the [[Ichalin Station]]—another [[Realspace/Legends|space]] station<ref name="CSWE Ichalin">{{CSWECite|II|76|Ichalin Station}}</ref> connected to Yansan and also introduced in ''Alliance Intelligence Reports''<ref name="AIR" />—in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]].<ref name="CSWE" />

The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', however, placed the respective [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] of the Hijoian Docks and Ichalin Station in grid square J-8 as part of the Expansion Region's Hijoian Space while the Fakir [[Sector/Legends|sector]] was placed in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> In addition, ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' claims the two Rebel transports at the Hijoian Docks were destroyed<ref name="CSWE" /> as opposed to merely being damaged.<ref name="AIR" /> This article assumes the information presented in ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' is erroneous on both accounts.
